scripts.pkg: npm run build && xcopy /E /I /Y front-end\dist dist\front-end\dist && pkg . --targets node18-win-x64 --output dist/quick-dist.exe
scripts.pkg:linux: npm run build && cp -r front-end/dist dist/front-end/dist && pkg . --targets node18-linux-x64 --output dist/quick-dist
scripts.pkg:mac: npm run build && cp -r front-end/dist dist/front-end/dist && pkg . --targets node18-macos-x64 --output dist/quick-dist
